entries.title: OWASP Noir
entries.description: An attack surface detector that parses your source code to automatically identify API endpoints, parameter structures, and web configurations.
entries.review: Excellent static analysis tool for mapping attack surfaces. It dramatically cuts down time spent finding exposed endpoints, especially shadow/undocumented routes. Highly recommended for security audits and automated CI pipeline integrations.
